column1: # cloud-nine-unity — upstream content we deliberately did NOT vendor
# The audit trail for what we left behind, so a future ECU bump reports "still skipped" instead of
# silently reinstating content we removed on purpose. scripts/check-provenance.sh enforces it:
# every rule=absent path must stay absent, and every rule=ours-wins path must be origin=original.
#   absent     — this path must NOT exist in the repo. check-provenance.sh fails if it reappears.
#                This is what makes the mobile strip stick.
#   ours-wins  — upstream has this path; we ship our own file there instead. The path exists, but
#                its content is ours and provenance.tsv marks it origin=original.
